rulings.Case Title: AR CAPITAL MANAGEMENT INC VS. MARIO ANGEL GUTIERREZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Defendant Mario Angel Gutierrez
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 16, 2018, Line 7. PLAINTIFF AR CAPITAL MANAGEMENT INC'S MOTION For Terminating Sanctions Against Defendant Mario Angel Gutierrez. GRANTED, subject to (1) opposition and (2) Defendant providing proper verifications to responses to Form Interrogatories and complete verified responses to Special Interrogatories and Request for Production no later than April 19, 2018 by 4:00 p.m. Plaintiff to prepare and serve order personally or by overnight mail and (courtesy copy by e-mail) no later than April 16, 2018. Responses shall be delivered personally or by overnight mail (and courtesy copy e-mailed) to be received by Plaintiff's counsel no later than April 19, 2018 by 4:00 p.m. If defendant fails to comply, Plaintiff shall file a declaration of non-compliance and Defendant's answer will be stricken. Sanctions granted in the amount of $2,010. =(501/ACM)
